untranslatable_reason: Pattern performance is heavily dependent on throwback/pullback behavior and gap presence characteristics that cannot be quantitatively encoded as simple indicator thresholds. Throwback monitoring requires multi-bar lookback logic and conditional entry timing post-breakout. Author is silent on stop placement and target computation, making precise exit conditions indeterminate. The success statistics are regime-dependent (bull vs bear market) but no market regime filter conditions are specified in the source pattern.
